site_tagline: Get a shareable link to download a build artifact from the latest successful GitHub Actions build.
public_note: Any public repository is accessible by default and visitors don't need to log in.
optional_auth: (optional, except for private repos; you can revoke anytime)
paste_prompt: Paste a GitHub link, get a dawnl.ink!
check_sections: Check out the sections below to see what you can do.
check_formats: Please check below for recognized link formats:
link_not_recognized: Did not detect a link to a GitHub workflow file, actions run, or artifact.
section_latest: Link to a repository's latest artifact
section_latest_desc: Insert the GitHub URL of a workflow file that uses actions/upload-artifact.
branch_matters: Note that the branch you are on also matters.
section_artifact_desc: Change the github.com prefix to this site — downloads work without GitHub login.
section_run: Extra links for a particular run
section_run_desc: A run is a collection of jobs. Artifacts are associated with the parent run.
section_bot: Bot that comments on pull requests
section_bot_desc: Add a workflow bot that replies with artifact links when a PR finishes building.
dashboard_desc: Repositories accessible through your GitHub App installation:
no_installations: No installations found. Install the GitHub App first.
repo_workflows_subtitle: Choose a workflow to generate dawnl.ink links
repo_workflows_empty: No active GitHub Actions workflows found for this repository.
repo_workflows_badge_preview: Latest build status (links to dawnl.ink artifacts)
repo_workflows_badge_hint: Paste the Markdown line into your README. The badge shows the latest run status; the link opens dawnl.ink artifacts for that workflow and default branch.
artifact_access: You can access this artifact by one of the following links, from least to most direct:
ephemeral_link: Ephemeral direct download link (expires in <1 minute)
stable_workflow_link: Permanent download link (latest successful build on this branch)
ephemeral_logs: Ephemeral link to logs (expires in <1 minute)
old_run_warning: Warning: the latest successful run is older than 90 days; artifacts may have expired.
preview_hint: If this workflow always produces exactly one artifact, you can drop '?preview' from the URL to redirect without naming the artifact.
status_param_hint: To allow any completed runs, not only successful ones, append ?status=completed to the URL.
adapt_url_hint: If you have several workflows or branches, you can adapt the URL by hand in a predictable way.
repo_not_found_private: Repository not found. If this is your private repository, authorize from the home page.
status_bad: Query parameter status must be 'success' (default) or 'completed'.
zip_only: Sorry, only *.zip downloads are supported for the moment.
artifact_expired: GitHub produced an error for this artifact download. Usually the artifact has expired (>90 days).
logs_expired: It seems that the logs for this job have expired.
